title: Gray
description: Arrival in the industrial world. No sky, just ceiling. Steampunk craft becomes raw function. Rivet Row.

lines: There was no sky. Not a clouded sky, not a dark sky. No sky at all. Just a ceiling — gray, flat, industrial — stretching in every direction.
The air tasted like recycled air. Not stale. Recycled. It had the flavor of efficiency and the aftertaste of nothing.
The ground was concrete. Poured, cured, and forgotten. Its purpose was to be stood on, not admired.

lines.text: The wrench-sword became a baton again. The Steamknight's coat simplified into a hard-worn jacket. His patch read: ENFORCER.
The Steampriest became a Safety Officer. The Alchemist became a Lab Technician. The Saboteur became the Whistleblower. The Busker became the PA Announcer.
